introSection: Mahuka is a steel launched roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride started operating on 8 June 2024. It was later officially opened on 15 June 2024.

fullText:
Mahuka is a steel launched roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

The ride started operating on 8 June 2024. It was later officially opened on 15 June 2024.





Mahuka is Hawaiian for "To Escape"
